name: Cold Cucumber Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cucumbers, peeled, seeded, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a large pot over medium heat. Add leeks, onion, celery, and cucumbers. Sauté until vegetables are softened.
2. Pour in sherry and chicken stock. Season with salt and pepper. Bring to a simmer.
3. Gradually stir in roux until well combined. Let the mixture cook for 20 minutes.
4. Stir in mustard, thyme, chervil, and orange juice. Cook for an additional 15 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and let cool. Divide soup into serving bowls and chill until cold.
6. Serve chilled.
